positive: Minimalist line art silhouette of a friendly, stylized fox standing amidst blooming wildflowers and celestial crescent moons. The design should be highly contrasting, using deep indigo and burnt orange accents against a crisp cream background. Focus on clean, bold lines and simple geometric shapes to emphasize the fox's elegant, alert pose. The composition must be perfectly centered for optimal apparel placement, featuring negative space to let the colors breathe. Perfect for screen printing, vector aesthetic, symmetry, vibrant pop art feel, highly detailed yet scalable illustration, studio lighting.
